Drive Safe puts your phone on silent, 
so you wont get distracted by your phone ringing while driving. 
Auto replies via text message to incoming calls and texts.
 
Auto Start: 
When enabled, Drive Safe will automatically switch on when you're driving 
and switch off when you leave the car.
 
Click the Big button to turn the app on or off.
 
When the button is Red, the app is off. 
When the button is green the app is on.
 
Emergency Mode: if a person calls you 3 times in a row, Drive Safe will switch off and the phone will ring aloud.
